mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, phone, email, user_type, enterprise_id, status, last_login_time, password_changed, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, phone, email, user_type, enterprise_id, status, password_changed, create_by) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{userType}, #{enterpriseId}, #{status}, #{passwordChanged}, #{createBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user
real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, password_changed = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, password_changed = 0, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET last_login_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
